_description: Maps each baseline's feature types to regex patterns over DEFault++ feature names. For 'Retrained' evaluation: select only features matching these patterns, drop all others, then train XGBoost on your 11/12 labels using the same 5-fold splits. Structural features (arch_enc, layer_idx_num, severity_scalar) are EXCLUDED for all baselines since no baseline uses them.

AutoTrainer.notes: AutoTrainer monitors loss, accuracy, and gradient magnitudes. Our update_ratio, weight_*, and grad_* features proxy gradient/weight monitoring. Decoder has explicit grad_norm/grad_abs_max instead of weight_mean/std. No validation metrics, no logit-level features, no attention/FFN internals.

DeepDiagnosis.notes: DeepDiagnosis adds activation monitoring over AutoTrainer. Our activation_mean/std and ffn_active features capture neuron-level behavior. Decoder has grad_norm/grad_abs_max for gradient monitoring.

DeepFD.notes: DeepFD uses 20 runtime data items expanded to 160 features via 8 statistical operators. Our features already have early/mid/final window aggregates (similar to their statistical operators). We include both train and val loss/accuracy to match their scope. Decoder has grad_norm/grad_abs_max for vanishing/exploding gradient indicators. No attention, positional, layernorm, or representation features.

DEFault_ICSE25.notes: DEFault has the broadest dynamic feature set among learning baselines. We include peak_mem and step_time as proxies for their hardware utilization features. Decoder has explicit grad features for gradient monitoring. Their static features (layer counts, shapes) have no direct equivalent in our feature set -- this is a known limitation of the retrained comparison.

FL4Deep.notes: FL4Deep's dynamic features are a subset of DeepFD's. Its static features (versions, layer types, optimizer choice) have no equivalent in our feature set. The KG reasoning component cannot be replicated -- retrained evaluation uses only the feature-based component.

_feature_count_estimates._note: Approximate number of our features matching each baseline's patterns. Run the regex patterns against enc/dec feature_names to get exact counts.
_feature_count_estimates.DeepFD: ~80-100 features (loss + accuracy + val + weight + activation + update_ratio)
_feature_count_estimates.DEFault_ICSE25: ~90-110 features (DeepFD + val_gap + classifier ratio + peak_mem + step_time)
_feature_count_estimates.FL4Deep: ~50-70 features (loss + val + accuracy + weight + update_ratio, no activation)
